summary: Completed testing of new RealtouchHR features: HMRC RTI submissions and Employee Self-Service Portal. All backend APIs working correctly (15/15 tests passed). Frontend pages load and display correctly. Fixed AuthContext to expose token for fetch-based API calls. Fixed RTIStatus class usage (removed .value). Added missing HMRCService methods (generate_fps_xml, generate_eps_xml, poll_submission_status).

minor.issue: Does not allow updating paye_reference and accounts_office_reference fields - these are required for HMRC RTI submissions

issues: Compliance score shows '00%' instead of '100%' in the circular gauge - display formatting issue (noted in previous iteration)

passed_tests: HMRC validate pay run (404 for non-existent) - POST /api/hmrc/validate/{payrun_id}
HMRC health check (404 for non-existent) - GET /api/hmrc/health-check/{payrun_id}
HMRC FPS submit (404 for non-existent) - POST /api/hmrc/fps/submit
HMRC validate existing pay run - returns validation result
HMRC health check existing pay run - returns health check with score
HMRC FPS submission - successfully submits to test mode
Self-service profile - GET /api/self-service/profile (403 for non-employee users)
Self-service payslips - GET /api/self-service/payslips (403 for non-employee users)
Self-service leave balance - GET /api/self-service/leave/balance (403 for non-employee users)
Self-service leave requests - GET /api/self-service/leave/requests (403 for non-employee users)
Self-service profile update - PUT /api/self-service/profile (404 for non-employee users)
Frontend: HMRC RTI page loads with Test Mode banner, Pay Run selection, Submission History
Frontend: Self-Service Portal loads with tabs (Overview, Payslips, Leave, Profile)
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows HMRC RTI and Self-Service links
Frontend: AI Copilot opens and responds
action_items: Add paye_reference and accounts_office_reference to allowed fields in PUT /api/company endpoint
Fix compliance score display showing '00%' instead of '100%' on dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: AuthContext was not exposing 'token' in value object - components using fetch() couldn't get the token
Fixed: RTIStatus class was being used with .value but it's not an enum - removed .value from all usages
Fixed: HMRCService was missing generate_fps_xml, generate_eps_xml, and poll_submission_status methods
Self-Service endpoints correctly return 403/404 for users not linked to employee records
HMRC RTI submissions work in TEST MODE - production requires HMRC Gateway credentials
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/hmrc.py - Fixed RTIStatus usage, added missing HMRCService methods
/app/tests/test_hmrc_selfservice.py - Created new test file for HMRC and Self-Service features
seed_data_creation: Added PAYE reference (123/ABC123) and Accounts Office Reference (123PA00012345) to test company for HMRC testing. Created FPS submission (rti_4937aecc5654) for verification.

mocked_apis.Email notifications (Resend): Uses mock implementation until RESEND_API_KEY is set
mocked_apis.HMRC Gateway submission: TEST MODE only - generates mock XML and returns simulated success response

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: HMRC RTI (validation, health check, FPS submission in test mode), Self-Service Portal (profile, payslips, leave balance, leave requests). AuthContext now exposes token for fetch-based API calls. Test company has PAYE reference set for HMRC testing. One FPS submission exists in database for verification.
